p.c: (forall(x0: Set[Y]) { not Y.is_open(x0) or X.is_open(set_preimage[X, Y](f, x0)) } = true)
(forall(x0: Set[Y]) { not (Y.is_open(x0) and not X.is_open(set_preimage[X, Y](f, x0))) })
function(x0: Set[Y]) { not (Y.is_open(x0) and not X.is_open(set_preimage[X, Y](f, x0))) }(v)
